summary: Smart Escalation AI Enhancement - All 19 backend tests PASSED. Frontend Escalation Dashboard working correctly with AI buttons, adaptive recommendation panels, L1/L2/L3 timer displays, L1 SKIP warning banner, and guardian profile stats. Both test mode (fast timers) and adaptive mode (computed timers with skip_l1) verified.

smart_guardian_profile: test_smart_profile_structure - PASS: guardian_id, total_incidents, response_rate, avg_response_minutes, response_by_time_of_day, response_by_severity, reliability_score, recommendation, has_sufficient_data
test_smart_profile_tod_stats - PASS: night, morning, afternoon, evening buckets
test_smart_profile_severity_stats - PASS: critical, high, medium, low
smart_recommendation: test_smart_rec_non_test_incident - PASS: mode=adaptive with computed timers
test_smart_rec_factors_structure - PASS: time_of_day, severity, guardian, combined factors
test_smart_rec_guardian_profile_summary - PASS: response_rate, avg_response_minutes, reliability_score, recommendation
scheduler_integration: test_smart_engine_factors_in_source - PASS: TOD factors (night=0.6, etc), Severity factors (critical=0.65, etc), SKIP_L1_RESPONSE_RATE=0.30, MIN_TIMER_MINUTES=1

escalation_rules_card.level1: 5 min - Primary Guardian - email, sms, push, sse
escalation_rules_card.level3: 15 min - All Operators - email, sms, push

adaptive_mode_skip_l1.skip_l1_banner: Displayed - 'L1 SKIP recommended — guardian unreliable for this pattern'
adaptive_mode_skip_l1.reason: Guardian responds to only 6% of incidents — skip L1, go direct to L2

skip_l1_logic.result: Guardian with 6% response rate correctly gets skip_l1=true, L1=0

frontend_ai_button.location: Right side of each escalation history row

frontend_recommendation_panel.displays: L1/L2/L3 adaptive timers with diff from static, factors, reasons, guardian profile

context_for_next_testing_agent: Smart Escalation AI Enhancement fully tested. 2 new API endpoints (smart-profile, smart-recommendation) verified. Escalation scheduler uses _get_smart_thresholds for adaptive escalation. Frontend EscalationDashboard.jsx shows AI buttons on history rows, clicking shows recommendation panel with adaptive L1/L2/L3 timers, diff from static, skip_l1 warning banner (when applicable), and guardian profile stats (response rate, avg time, reliability score). Guardian with 6% response rate correctly triggers skip_l1=true recommendation.
